items.question: Напиши запрос который выведет исходящий остаток по счету 42111978300000577972 на дату 24.05.2026.
items.answer:
SELECT
  a.account_nbr,
  r.balance_date,
  r.balance_out
FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest r
JOIN v_d_account a
  ON a.account_id = r.account_id
WHERE a.account_nbr = '42111978300000577972'
  AND r.balance_date = DATE '2026-05-24';

items.question: Постройте распределение количества вновь зарегистрированных в системе организаций по годам, но только для тех, чья отрасль содержит слово строительство.
items.answer:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM reg_date)::int AS reg_year, COUNT(*) AS org_count
FROM v_d_entity_org
WHERE reg_date IS NOT NULL
  AND okved ILIKE '%строительство%'
GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM reg_date)::int
ORDER BY reg_year;

items.question: Суммируй исходящий остаток в каждой валюте на дату '2026-05-24'.
items.answer:
SELECT
  f.code AS currency_code,
  r.currency_id,
  SUM(r.balance_out) AS total_balance_out
FROM v_f_account_rest r
JOIN vfund f
  ON r.currency_id = f.id
WHERE r.report_date = DATE '2026-05-24'
GROUP BY f.code, r.currency_id;

items.question: Вывести сумму рублевого остатка на счете по маскам счетов 40817, 40702 и 40821 на дату '2026-05-24' для каждой маски.
items.answer:
SELECT
  left(da.account_nbr, 5) AS account_mask,
  sum(far.balance_rur_out) AS sum_ruble_balance
FROM v_f_account_rest far
JOIN v_d_account da
  ON da.account_id = far.account_id
WHERE far.report_date = date '2026-05-24'
  AND left(da.account_nbr, 5) in ('40817', '40702', '40821')
GROUP BY left(da.account_nbr, 5);

items.question: Выведи топ 3 наименования счета у которого был максимальный оборот по кредиту в рублях на дату '2026-05-24'.
items.answer:
SELECT
  a.account_nm,
  SUM(t.cr_amount) AS cr_turn_rur
FROM v_f_acc_transaction t
JOIN v_d_account a
  ON a.account_id = t.cr_account_id
WHERE t.document_dt = DATE '2026-05-24'
GROUP BY a.account_id, a.account_nm
ORDER BY cr_turn_rur DESC
LIMIT 3;

items.question: Предоставить запрос по договорам брокерского обслуживания на дату 2025-06-01.
items.answer:
SELECT
  c.*,
  p.*
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_client c
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_psn p
  ON p.entity_core_id = c.entity_core_id
WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-06-01'
  AND c.begin_date <= DATE '2025-06-01'
  AND (c.end_date IS NULL
  OR c.end_date >= DATE '2025-06-01');

items.question: Найти топ-5 локаций по количеству брокерских договоров за 2025 год. Вывести локацию, количество брокерских договоров, самую раннюю и самую позднюю дату открытия договора среди них.
items.answer:
SELECT
  location,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS agreement_count,
  MIN(open_dt) AS earliest_open_dt,
  MAX(open_dt) AS latest_open_dt
FROM v_d_broker_agmt
WHERE open_dt >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND open_dt < DATE '2026-01-01'
GROUP BY location
ORDER BY agreement_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

items.question: Проанализируйте портфель кредитных договоров по группам риска РВП за 2025-11-01. Для каждой группы риска выведите код группы риска, количество активных договоров, общую сумму начисленных процентов, среднюю сумму процентов на договор и максимальную дату открытия договора в группе.
items.answer:
SELECT
  risk_group_rvp AS risk_group_rvp_code,
  COUNT(*) AS active_contract_count,
  SUM(interest_balance_out) AS total_interest_accrued,
  AVG(interest_balance_out) AS avg_interest_per_contract,
  MAX(start_date) AS max_open_date
FROM v_f_contract
WHERE report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND start_date <= DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND (fact_final_date IS NULL
  OR fact_final_date > DATE '2025-11-01')
GROUP BY risk_group_rvp;

items.question: Какой средний показатель оборота по дебету в валюте счета по рублевым счетам на дату '2026-05-24'?
items.answer:
SELECT AVG(f.db_turn_eqv) AS avg_db_turn_eqv
FROM v_f_account_rest f
JOIN v_d_account a
  ON f.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE f.report_date = DATE '2026-05-24'
  AND a.currency_id = 643;

items.question: Покажи 100 клиентов которые были зарегистрированы в последние 3 месяца. Выведи идентификатор CORE, наименование организации, ИНН.
items.answer:
SELECT DISTINCT
  org.entity_core_id,
  org.full_name,
  org.tin
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_client c
JOIN v_d_entity_org org
  ON c.entity_core_id = org.entity_core_id
WHERE org.reg_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 months'
LIMIT 100;

items.question: Какие отрасли наиболее представлены среди клиентов, топ-10?
items.answer:
SELECT
  okdpcode AS industry_code,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count
FROM vcustomer
WHERE okdpcode IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY okdpcode
ORDER BY customer_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

items.question: За дату '2025-11-01' выведи топ-5 договоров РКО с максимальным количеством связанных счетов. Покажите идентификатор договора, номер договора, дату открытия, тип договора и количество счетов.
items.answer:
SELECT
  rc.agreement_id,
  rc.agreement_nbr,
  rc.open_date,
  rc.dog_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rca.account_id) AS account_count
FROM rko_contracts rc
JOIN rko_contracts_accounts rca
  ON rc.agreement_id = rca.agreement_id
  AND rc.report_date = rca.report_date
WHERE rc.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY rc.agreement_id, rc.agreement_nbr, rc.open_date, rc.dog_type
ORDER BY account_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

items.question: За дату '2025-11-01' выведите уникальное количество счетов в договорах РКО для каждого филиала, сгруппированную по типу продукта. Покажите код филиала, регион, наименование продукта, тип договора и уникальное количество счетов. Ограничьте вывод 5 первыми записями.
items.answer:
SELECT
  c.branch_code,
  c.brnch_region_cd AS region,
  c.product_nm,
  c.dog_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) AS unique_account_cnt
FROM rko_contracts c
JOIN rko_contracts_accounts a
  ON a.agreement_id = c.agreement_id
WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY c.branch_code, c.brnch_region_cd, c.product_nm, c.dog_type
LIMIT 5;

items.question: За дату '2025-11-01' проанализируйте роли счетов в договорах РКО. Выведите 5 самых распространенных ролей счетов, указав код роли, ее наименование, тип договора, продукт и количество договоров, использующих эту роль.
items.answer:
SELECT
  a.account_role_code AS role_code,
  COALESCE(ar.long_name, a.account_role_name) AS role_name,
  c.dog_type AS contract_type,
  a.product_nm AS product,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.agreement_id) AS contract_count
FROM rko_contracts_accounts a
JOIN rko_contracts c
  ON c.agreement_id = a.agreement_id
LEFT JOIN v_account_role ar
  ON ar.account_role_id = a.account_role_id
WHERE a.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY a.account_role_code, COALESCE(ar.long_name, a.account_role_name), c.dog_type, a.product_nm
ORDER BY contract_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

items.question: Вывести топ-5 валют по количеству открытых счетов за 2023 год. Для каждой валюты показать ее код, название, числовой ISO код и количество счетов. Отсортировать по убыванию количества счетов.
items.answer:
SELECT
  c.code,
  c.name,
  c.isocode,
  COUNT(DISTINCT a.account_id) AS account_count
FROM v_f_account_rest a
JOIN vfund c
  ON a.currency_id = c.id
WHERE a.open_dt >= DATE '2023-01-01'
  AND a.open_dt < DATE '2024-01-01'
GROUP BY c.code, c.name, c.isocode
ORDER BY account_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

items.question: Для 5 самых популярных балансовых счетов 2-го порядка по количеству закрытых лицевых счетов до 2026-01-01 вывести номер, название, наименование счета первого порядка, общее количество лицевых счетов и средний срок между открытием и закрытием.
items.answer:
WITH closed_accounts AS (SELECT da.bal_acct_2lvl_nbr, da.account_nm, sa.sinaccount, sa.name AS sinaccount_name, a.id AS account_id, (a.closedate - a.opendate) AS open_close_days
FROM vaccount a
JOIN v_d_account da
  ON da.account_id = a.id
JOIN vsinaccount sa
  ON sa.id = da.balance_account_id
WHERE a.closedate IS NOT NULL
  AND a.closedate < DATE '2026-01-01')
SELECT
  bal_acct_2lvl_nbr AS account_2lvl_number,
  account_nm AS account_2lvl_name,
  sinaccount AS first_order_account_number,
  sinaccount_name AS first_order_account_name,
  COUNT(*) AS closed_accounts_cnt,
  AVG(open_close_days) AS avg_open_close_days
FROM closed_accounts
GROUP BY bal_acct_2lvl_nbr, account_nm, sinaccount, sinaccount_name
ORDER BY closed_accounts_cnt DESC
LIMIT 5;

items.question: Найти 5 счетов с наибольшим суммарным оборотом, сумма всех операций по дебету плюс по кредиту в рублевом эквиваленте, за 2025 год. Для каждого счета вывести номер, наименование, код валюты счета, общий оборот, количество операций и дату открытия счета.
items.answer:
WITH acct_ops AS (SELECT account_id, SUM(amount_eqv) AS total_turnover, COUNT(*) AS operation_cnt
FROM (SELECT db_account_id AS account_id, amount_eqv
FROM v_f_acc_transaction
WHERE transaction_dt >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND transaction_dt < DATE '2026-01-01'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  cr_account_id AS account_id,
  amount_eqv
FROM v_f_acc_transaction
WHERE transaction_dt >= DATE '2025-01-01'
  AND transaction_dt < DATE '2026-01-01') t
GROUP BY account_id)
SELECT
  a.account_nbr,
  a.account_nm,
  a.currency_id,
  x.total_turnover,
  x.operation_cnt,
  a.open_dt
FROM acct_ops x
JOIN v_d_account a
  ON a.account_id = x.account_id
ORDER BY x.total_turnover DESC
LIMIT 5;

items.question: На отчетную дату 2025-06-30 выведите топ-5 филиалов по количеству активных брокерских договоров, закрепленных за допофисами: код филиала, наименование филиала, количество уникальных договоров, количество уникальных допофисов и среднее количество договоров на один допофис.
items.answer:
WITH active_agreements AS (SELECT DISTINCT d.brnch_entity_id, a.agreement_id, a.account_id
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_acc_asn a
JOIN v_d_account d
  ON a.account_id = d.account_id
WHERE a.report_date = DATE '2025-06-30'
  AND a.begin_date <= DATE '2025-06-30'
  AND (a.end_date IS NULL
  OR a.end_date >= DATE '2025-06-30'))
SELECT
  b.code AS branch_code,
  b.name AS branch_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT aa.agreement_id) AS agreement_cnt,
  COUNT(DISTINCT aa.account_id) AS dopofis_cnt,
  COUNT(DISTINCT aa.agreement_id)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT aa.account_id), 0) AS avg_agreements_per_dopofis
FROM active_agreements aa
JOIN vbranch b
  ON aa.brnch_entity_id = b.id
GROUP BY b.code, b.name
ORDER BY agreement_cnt DESC
LIMIT 5;

items.question: Выведите топ-5 брокерских договоров с максимальным периодом действия одного тарифа в днях за 2025-11-01. Для каждого договора покажите номер договора, тариф, дату начала и окончания, длительность периода.
items.answer:
WITH tariff_periods AS (SELECT d.agreement_nbr, a.tariff, a.begin_date, a.end_date, (a.end_date - a.begin_date + 1) AS duration_days, MAX(a.end_date - a.begin_date + 1) OVER (PARTITION BY a.agreement_id) AS max_duration_days
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_tariff_asn a
JOIN v_d_broker_agmt d
  ON d.agreement_id = a.agreement_id
WHERE a.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'), top_agreements AS (SELECT DISTINCT agreement_nbr, max_duration_days
FROM tariff_periods
ORDER BY max_duration_days DESC, agreement_nbr
LIMIT 5)
SELECT
  tp.agreement_nbr AS agreement_nbr,
  tp.tariff,
  tp.begin_date,
  tp.end_date,
  tp.duration_days
FROM tariff_periods tp
JOIN top_agreements ta
  ON ta.agreement_nbr = tp.agreement_nbr
ORDER BY ta.max_duration_days DESC, tp.agreement_nbr, tp.tariff, tp.begin_date, tp.end_date;

items.question: Проанализируйте динамику ставок для кредитных договоров, у которых в течение последних 30 дней до 2025-11-01 изменилась базовая ставка. Для каждой группы риска выведите название группы риска, количество договоров, среднюю предыдущую маржу, среднюю текущую маржу и среднюю разницу ставок.
items.answer:
WITH changed AS (SELECT base_rate_name, agreement_id, margin AS current_margin, previos_margin AS previous_margin, margin - previos_margin AS rate_diff
FROM v_f_contract_rate_ref
WHERE report_date BETWEEN DATE '2025-10-02'
  AND DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND previos_percent_rate IS NOT NULL
  AND base_rate IS DISTINCT
FROM previos_percent_rate)
SELECT
  base_rate_name AS risk_group_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS contract_count,
  AVG(previous_margin) AS avg_previous_margin,
  AVG(current_margin) AS avg_current_margin,
  AVG(rate_diff) AS avg_rate_diff
FROM changed
GROUP BY base_rate_name;

items.question: Для каждого филиала на 2025-11-01 определите распределение остатков по типам счетов по кредитным договорам. Выведите код филиала, тип остатка счета, количество уникальных договоров, общую сумму остатков и средний остаток на один договор.
items.answer:
SELECT
  ar.brnch_cd AS branch_code,
  co.account_balance_type_cd AS account_balance_type_cd,
  count(DISTINCT co.agreement_id) AS unique_contract_count,
  sum(ar.balance_out) AS total_balance_out,
  avg(ar.balance_out) AS avg_balance_per_contract
FROM v_f_contract_od co
JOIN v_f_account_rest ar
  ON ar.account_id = co.account_core_id
  AND ar.report_date = co.report_date
WHERE co.report_date = date '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY ar.brnch_cd, co.account_balance_type_cd;

items.question: Есть ли дубликаты по ИНН среди клиентов, где он не пустой и заполнен значением. Выведи топ 10 ИНН и количество дублей.
items.answer:
WITH clients AS (SELECT tax_number AS inn
FROM v_d_entity_org
WHERE tax_number IS NOT NULL
  AND btrim(tax_number) <> ''
UNION ALL
SELECT tax_number AS inn
FROM v_d_entity_psn
WHERE tax_number IS NOT NULL
  AND btrim(tax_number) <> '')
SELECT
  inn,
  COUNT(*) - 1 AS duplicate_count
FROM clients
GROUP BY inn
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY duplicate_count DESC, inn
LIMIT 10;

items.question: Найти все актуальные остатки по счетам для сделок РЕПО, которые были заключены в текущем году на текущую отчетную дату. Вывести дату отчета, номер сделки, тип РЕПО, валюту и остаток.
items.answer:
WITH current_report_date AS (SELECT MAX(balance_date) AS report_date
FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest)
SELECT
  r.balance_date AS report_date,
  d.deal_security_nbr,
  d.type_repo,
  r.currency_id,
  r.balance_out
FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest r
JOIN v_f_repo_deal d
  ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = r.leg1_deal_security_id
JOIN current_report_date c
  ON r.balance_date = c.report_date
WHERE d.trade_dt >= date_trunc('year', c.report_date)::date
  AND d.trade_dt < (date_trunc('year', c.report_date) + interval '1 year')::date;

items.question: Сделай выборку номеров сделок, типа РЕПО и роли счета по сделкам, исполненным в прошлом месяце. Отфильтровать записи так, чтобы остаток был актуален на дату жизни сделки, результат отсортировать по номеру сделки и роли счета.
items.answer:
SELECT DISTINCT
  d.deal_security_nbr,
  d.type_repo,
  a.account_core_role_nm,
  r.short_name AS account_role_nm
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
JOIN v_f_repo_acc_asn a
  ON a.leg1_deal_security_id = d.leg1_deal_security_id
JOIN v_account_role r
  ON r.account_role_id = a.account_core_role_id
JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest b
  ON b.leg1_deal_security_id = d.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND b.balance_date = d.trade_dt
WHERE d.trade_dt >= date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 month'
  AND d.trade_dt < date_trunc('month', current_date)
  AND d.type_repo IS NOT NULL
  AND b.balance_out IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.deal_security_nbr, r.short_name, a.account_core_role_nm;

items.question: Найти все случаи за последние 3 месяца, когда у одного и того же счета в рамках одной сделки РЕПО различаются периоды действия остатка и периоды действия применения роли. Вывести номер сделки, идентификатор счета и даты начала/окончания этих периодов.
items.answer:
WITH asn AS (SELECT a.leg1_deal_security_id, a.account_id, a.start_date AS asn_start_date, a.final_date AS asn_final_date, a.balance_date
FROM v_f_repo_acc_asn a
WHERE a.balance_date >= current_date - interval '3 months'), rest AS (SELECT r.leg1_deal_security_id, r.account_id, r.start_date AS rest_start_date, r.final_date AS rest_final_date, r.balance_date
FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest r
WHERE r.balance_date >= current_date - interval '3 months')
SELECT DISTINCT
  d.deal_security_nbr,
  a.account_id,
  a.asn_start_date,
  a.asn_final_date,
  r.rest_start_date,
  r.rest_final_date
FROM asn a
JOIN rest r
  ON r.leg1_deal_security_id = a.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND r.account_id = a.account_id
  AND r.balance_date = a.balance_date
JOIN v_f_repo_deal d
  ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = a.leg1_deal_security_id
WHERE a.asn_start_date is DISTINCT
FROM r.rest_start_date
  OR a.asn_final_date is DISTINCT
FROM r.rest_final_date;

items.question: Найти все сделки РЕПО, по которым на дату отчета нет назначенных счетов в таблице ACC_ASN или нет остатков в ACC_REST. Вывести номер сделки, тип сделки и причину.
items.answer:
SELECT
  coalesce(asn.leg1_deal_security_id, rest.leg1_deal_security_id) AS deal_number,
  'REPO' AS deal_type,
  CASE
  WHEN asn.leg1_deal_security_id is null THEN 'нет назначенных счетов в ACC_ASN'
  WHEN rest.leg1_deal_security_id is null THEN 'нет остатков в ACC_REST' END AS reason
FROM v_f_repo_acc_asn asn
FULL OUTER JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest rest
  ON rest.leg1_deal_security_id = asn.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND rest.balance_date = asn.balance_date
WHERE asn.leg1_deal_security_id is null
  OR rest.leg1_deal_security_id is null;

items.question: Для сделок РЕПО, где вторая нога еще не исполнена, показать текущие остатки по счетам. Вывести номер сделки, остаток и дату его окончания.
items.answer:
SELECT
  d.deal_security_nbr AS deal_security_nbr,
  r.balance_out,
  r.final_date
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
JOIN v_f_repo_acc_rest r
  ON r.leg1_deal_security_id = d.leg1_deal_security_id
WHERE d.leg2_exec_dt IS NULL;

items.question: Найти сделки за последние 6 месяцев, где валюта расчетов отличается от валюты номинала ценной бумаги. Вывести номер сделки, обе валюты и факт расхождения.
items.answer:
SELECT
  c.agreement_nbr AS deal_number,
  c.agreement_currency AS settlement_currency,
  s.nominal_crcy_id::text AS nominal_currency,
  (c.agreement_currency IS DISTINCT
FROM s.nominal_crcy_id::text) AS currency_mismatch, c.agreement_id
FROM v_f_contract c
JOIN v_security s
  ON s.id = c.instrument_id
WHERE c.report_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'
  AND c.agreement_currency IS DISTINCT
FROM s.nominal_crcy_id::text;

items.question: Для конкретной сделки РЕПО вывести основную информацию: номер сделки, тип сделки и связанные счета, взять максимальную балансовую дату.
items.answer:
SELECT DISTINCT
  ON (d.deal_security_nbr) d.deal_security_nbr, d.type_repo, d.leg1_abs_id, d.leg2_abs_id, a.account_id, d.balance_date
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
LEFT JOIN v_f_repo_acc_asn a
  ON d.leg1_deal_security_id = a.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND d.leg2_deal_security_id = a.leg2_deal_security_id
WHERE d.deal_security_nbr = 'DEAL_SECURITY_NBR_26790'
ORDER BY d.deal_security_nbr, d.balance_date DESC;

items.question: Выведите глобальный идентификатор, текущий статус и код страны фактического нахождения для всех актуальных клиентов, которые являются налоговыми резидентами России.
items.answer:
SELECT
  c.code AS global_identifier,
  es.status_cd AS current_status,
  fc.isocode AS fact_country_code
FROM vcustomer c
JOIN v_f_entity_country ec
  ON ec.entity_id = c.id
JOIN vcountry tc
  ON tc.id = ec.tax_country_id
JOIN vcountry fc
  ON fc.id = ec.fact_country_id
LEFT JOIN lateral (SELECT s.status_cd
FROM v_f_entity_status s
WHERE s.entity_id = c.id
  AND s.start_date <= current_date
  AND (s.final_date is null
  OR s.final_date >= current_date)
ORDER BY s.start_date desc, s.date_time_update desc
LIMIT 1) es
  ON true
WHERE tc.isocode = 'RU'
  AND ec.start_date <= current_date
  AND (ec.final_date is null
  OR ec.final_date >= current_date);

items.question: Найдите ИП, у которых страна регистрации, фактического нахождения и налогообложения одна и та же, например все RUS. Выведите их ИНН, дату начала действия этого статуса страны и текущий статус клиента.
items.answer:
SELECT DISTINCT
  d.tax_number AS inn,
  c.start_date AS country_status_start_date,
  s.status_cd AS current_client_status
FROM v_d_entity_org d
JOIN v_f_entity_country c
  ON c.entity_id = d.entity_core_id
JOIN v_f_entity_status s
  ON s.entity_id = d.entity_core_id
WHERE d.tax_number IS NOT NULL
  AND c.reg_country_iso_cd = c.fact_country_iso_cd
  AND c.reg_country_iso_cd = c.tax_country_iso_cd
  AND c.reg_country_iso_cd = 'RUS'
  AND (s.final_date IS NULL
  OR CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN s.start_date
  AND s.final_date);

items.question: Вывести ID клиента в CORE, признак актуальности и ISO код страны регистрации для всех клиентов, чей статус УМЕР и чья страна деятельности не совпадает со страной регистрации.
items.answer:
SELECT
  s.entity_id AS client_core_id,
  CASE
  WHEN s.status_cd = 'УМЕР' THEN true
  ELSE false END AS actuality_flag, c.reg_country_iso_cd
FROM v_f_entity_status s
JOIN v_f_entity_country c
  ON c.entity_id = s.entity_id
WHERE s.status_cd = 'УМЕР'
  AND c.fact_country_id IS DISTINCT
FROM c.reg_country_id;

items.question: Для клиентов, у которых есть иностранный налоговый номер, выведите их ID в MDM, дату изменения записи в CORE и ISO код страны налогообложения, но только если их текущий статус не закрыт.
items.answer:
WITH current_status AS (SELECT entity_id, status_cd, final_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id
ORDER BY final_date DESC NULLS LAST, date_time_update DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn
FROM v_f_entity_status)
SELECT DISTINCT
  p.entity_mdm_id,
  p.date_time_update,
  c.tax_country_iso_cd
FROM v_d_entity_psn p
JOIN v_f_entity_country c
  ON c.entity_id = p.entity_core_id
JOIN current_status s
  ON s.entity_id = p.entity_core_id
  AND s.rn = 1
WHERE p.tax_number IS NOT NULL
  AND btrim(p.tax_number) <> ''
  AND s.status_cd IS DISTINCT
FROM 'closed';

items.question: Найти все договоры, где есть сделки с истекшей второй ногой, но договор еще не закрыт. Вывести номер договора, дату открытия договора, количество просроченных сделок, максимальную дату истечения ноги.
items.answer:
SELECT
  c.agreement_nbr,
  c.open_date,
  COUNT(*) AS overdue_deals_cnt,
  MAX(d.leg2_exec_dt) AS max_leg2_expiry_dt
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
JOIN rko_contracts c
  ON c.agreement_id = d.agreement_id
WHERE c.close_date IS NULL
  AND d.leg2_exec_dt < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY c.agreement_nbr, c.open_date;

items.question: Необходимо получить список договоров РКО за дату в разрезе валют по клиентам являющимися юридическими лицами. Вывести код валюты, краткое наименование валюты и количество договоров.
items.answer:
SELECT
  f.code AS currency_code,
  f.brief AS currency_short_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT rc.agreement_id) AS contract_count
FROM rko_contracts rc
JOIN vfund f
  ON rc.currency_id = f.id
JOIN v_d_entity_org eo
  ON rc.org_entity_id = eo.entity_core_id
WHERE rc.report_date = CURRENT_DATE
  AND eo.entity_type IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY f.code, f.brief;

items.question: Выведите топ-5 филиалов по коду с наибольшим количеством открытых действующих счетов на дату '2025-11-01'. Для каждого филиала в разрезе допофиса покажите код филиала, название филиала, наименование допофиса, количество счетов, количество уникальных клиентов-владельцев и средний срок действия счетов в днях.
items.answer:
WITH filtered_accounts AS (SELECT a.account_id, a.brnch_entity_id, a.dept_entity_id, a.owner_entity_id, a.open_dt, a.close_dt
FROM v_d_account a
WHERE a.open_dt <= DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND (a.close_dt IS NULL
  OR a.close_dt > DATE '2025-11-01')), top_branches AS (SELECT fa.brnch_entity_id
FROM filtered_accounts fa
GROUP BY fa.brnch_entity_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, fa.brnch_entity_id
LIMIT 5)
SELECT
  b.code AS branch_code,
  b.name AS branch_name,
  d.department_name AS dopofis_name,
  COUNT(*) AS accounts_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT fa.owner_entity_id) AS unique_owner_customers_count,
  AVG(COALESCE(fa.close_dt, DATE '2025-11-01') - fa.open_dt) AS avg_account_term_days
FROM filtered_accounts fa
JOIN vbranch b
  ON b.id = fa.brnch_entity_id
JOIN top_branches tb
  ON tb.brnch_entity_id = fa.brnch_entity_id
LEFT JOIN v_department_pc_fed d
  ON d.department_core_id = fa.dept_entity_id
GROUP BY b.code, b.name, d.department_name
ORDER BY accounts_count DESC, branch_code, dopofis_name;

items.question: Для каждого филиала и типа платежа за дату 2025-11-01 вывести количество активных кредитных договоров, общую плановую сумму платежей, среднюю процентную ставку по графикам, максимальную дату окончания платежного периода. Показать только записи, где общая сумма платежей превышает 100000, отсортировать по ней по убыванию.
items.answer:
WITH active_contracts AS (SELECT DISTINCT p.instrument_id AS account_id, p.agreement_id, p.transaction_type_name
FROM v_f_agmt_payment p
LEFT JOIN v_d_account a
  ON a.account_id = p.instrument_id
LEFT JOIN v_f_contract c
  ON c.agreement_id = p.agreement_id
  AND c.instrument_id = p.instrument_id
  AND c.report_date = p.report_date
WHERE p.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
  AND ((a.close_dt IS NULL
  OR a.close_dt > DATE '2025-11-01')
  OR (c.fact_final_date IS NULL
  OR c.fact_final_date > DATE '2025-11-01'))), schedule_agg AS (SELECT s.report_date, s.agreement_id, s.instrument_id, SUM(s.sched_pay_amt) AS total_planned_payment, AVG(s.interest_rate) AS avg_interest_rate, MAX(s.sched_final_dt) AS max_payment_period_end_dt
FROM v_f_agmt_schedule s
WHERE s.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY s.report_date, s.agreement_id, s.instrument_id)
SELECT
  b.id AS branch_id,
  b.name AS branch_name,
  p.transaction_type_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ac.agreement_id) AS active_contract_count,
  SUM(sa.total_planned_payment) AS total_planned_payment,
  AVG(sa.avg_interest_rate) AS avg_interest_rate,
  MAX(sa.max_payment_period_end_dt) AS max_payment_period_end_dt
FROM v_f_agmt_payment p
JOIN schedule_agg sa
  ON sa.report_date = p.report_date
  AND sa.agreement_id = p.agreement_id
  AND sa.instrument_id = p.instrument_id
JOIN active_contracts ac
  ON ac.account_id = p.instrument_id
  AND ac.agreement_id = p.agreement_id
  AND ac.transaction_type_name = p.transaction_type_name
JOIN v_d_account a
  ON a.account_id = p.instrument_id
JOIN vbranch b
  ON b.id = a.brnch_entity_id
WHERE p.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
GROUP BY b.id, b.name, p.transaction_type_name
HAVING SUM(sa.total_planned_payment) > 100000
ORDER BY total_planned_payment DESC;

items.question: Найти клиентов по кредитным договорам, у которых за 2025-11-01 общий остаток по счетам превышает 1000000000. Вывести краткое наименование клиента, количество договоров, общую сумму остатков, общую сумму начисленных процентов и среднюю группу риска РВП.
items.answer:
WITH cte AS (SELECT e.short_name, c.agreement_id, ca.balance_out, c.interest_balance_out
FROM v_f_contract c
JOIN v_f_contract_account ca
  ON ca.agreement_id = c.agreement_id
  AND ca.report_date = c.report_date
JOIN v_d_entity_org e
  ON e.entity_core_id = ca.contractor_core_id
WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01')
SELECT
  short_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS contract_count,
  SUM(balance_out) AS total_balance_out,
  SUM(interest_balance_out) AS total_interest_balance,
  AVG(interest_balance_out) AS avg_risk_group_rvp
FROM cte
GROUP BY short_name
HAVING SUM(balance_out) > 1000000000;

items.question: Получить сводные остатки по валютам и банковским продуктам для всех активных сделок РЕПО на заданную дату. Вывести продукт, валюту, количество сделок и суммарный остаток.
items.answer:
SELECT
  d.product_cd AS product,
  c.isocode AS currency,
  COUNT(DISTINCT d.agreement_id) AS deal_count,
  SUM(COALESCE(d.buy_amount, d.sell_amount)) AS total_balance
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
JOIN vfund c
  ON c.id = d.settle_cur_id
WHERE d.balance_date = DATE '2023-03-07'
GROUP BY d.product_cd, c.isocode;

items.question: Получить сводные остатки за последний месяц по типам РЕПО и ролям счетов. Вывести тип сделки, роль счета и суммарный остаток.
items.answer:
SELECT
  d.type_repo,
  a.account_core_role_nm,
  SUM(r.balance_out) AS total_balance
FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest r
JOIN v_f_repo_deal d
  ON r.leg1_deal_security_id = d.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND r.balance_date = d.balance_date
JOIN v_f_repo_acc_asn a
  ON r.leg1_deal_security_id = a.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND r.account_id = a.account_id
  AND r.balance_date = a.balance_date
WHERE r.balance_date = (SELECT MAX(balance_date)
FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest
WHERE balance_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'
  AND balance_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE))
GROUP BY d.type_repo, a.account_core_role_nm;

items.question: Вывести любые 5 записей за 2025-11-01 по связанным счетам с договорами брокерского обслуживания. Вывести номер счета, номер договора, краткое наименование типа связи лицевого счета и договора, код торговой площадки, дату начала и окончания применения счета с учетом роли.
items.answer:
SELECT
  rca.account_number,
  rc.agreement_nbr,
  ar.short_name AS account_role_short_name,
  rca.account_role_code AS trading_venue_code,
  rca.date_from,
  rca.date_to
FROM rko_contracts_accounts rca
JOIN rko_contracts rc
  ON rc.agreement_id = rca.agreement_id
JOIN v_account_role ar
  ON ar.account_role_id = rca.account_role_id
WHERE rca.report_date = DATE '2025-11-01'
LIMIT 5;

items.question: Найдите все действующие кредитные договоры за 2025-11-01, у которых суммарный остаток по всем связанным ссудным счетам превышает средний остаток по таким счетам в портфеле. Выведите номер договора, краткое наименование клиента, группу риска РВП, количество счетов и суммарный остаток.
items.answer:
WITH contract_accounts AS (SELECT c.agreement_id, c.agreement_nbr, o.short_name AS client_short_name, c.report_date, a.account_id, da.account_nbr, da.account_nm, da.parent_account_id, coalesce(ar.short_name, ca.account_role_short_name) AS rvp_risk_group, arca.balance_out AS account_rest
FROM rko_contracts c
JOIN rko_contracts_accounts a
  ON a.agreement_id = c.agreement_id
  AND a.report_date = c.report_date
JOIN v_d_account da
  ON da.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN v_f_contract_account ca
  ON ca.report_date = c.report_date
  AND ca.agreement_id = c.agreement_id
  AND ca.account_core_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN v_account_role ar
  ON ar.account_role_id = a.account_role_id
LEFT JOIN v_f_account_rest arca
  ON arca.report_date = c.report_date
  AND arca.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN v_d_entity_org o
  ON o.entity_core_id = c.org_entity_id
WHERE c.report_date = date '2025-11-01'
  AND (c.close_date is null
  OR c.close_date > date '2025-11-01')
  AND (c.plan_close_dt is null
  OR c.plan_close_dt > date '2025-11-01')
  AND a.account_role_id is not null), portfolio_avg AS (SELECT avg(account_rest) AS avg_account_rest
FROM contract_accounts)
SELECT
  ca.agreement_nbr AS contract_nbr,
  ca.client_short_name,
  ca.rvp_risk_group,
  count(*) AS account_count,
  sum(ca.account_rest) AS total_account_rest
FROM contract_accounts ca
CROSS JOIN portfolio_avg pa
GROUP BY ca.agreement_nbr, ca.client_short_name, ca.rvp_risk_group, pa.avg_account_rest
HAVING sum(ca.account_rest) > pa.avg_account_rest;

items.question: Для всех активных сделок РЕПО показать агрегированную информацию: общее количество сделок и договоров, суммарные остатки, среднюю ставку и самую позднюю дату исполнения первой ноги.
items.answer:
WITH latest_snapshot AS (SELECT max(balance_date) AS balance_date
FROM v_f_repo_deal), active_deals AS (SELECT d.*
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
CROSS JOIN latest_snapshot ls
JOIN v_d_repo_contract c
  ON c.agreement_id = d.agreement_id
  AND c.balance_date = d.balance_date
WHERE d.balance_date = ls.balance_date
  AND coalesce(c.fact_close_dt, date '9999-12-31') > d.balance_date)
SELECT
  count(DISTINCT ad.leg1_deal_security_id) AS deal_count,
  count(DISTINCT ad.agreement_id) AS contract_count,
  sum(ad.sell_amount) AS total_sell_amount,
  sum(ad.buy_amount) AS total_buy_amount,
  avg(r.rate) AS avg_rate,
  max(ad.leg1_exec_dt) AS latest_leg1_exec_dt
FROM active_deals ad
LEFT JOIN v_f_repo_rate r
  ON r.leg1_deal_security_id = ad.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND r.balance_date = ad.balance_date;

items.question: Для всех сделок РЕПО, открытых в текущем году, показать агрегированную информацию по типам РЕПО: общее количество сделок, среднюю и максимальную суммы остатков, средний срок до исполнения первой ноги и количество уникальных договоров.
items.answer:
WITH repo_deals AS (SELECT type_repo, agreement_id, sell_amount, buy_amount, trade_dt, leg2_exec_dt
FROM v_f_repo_deal
WHERE trade_dt >= date_trunc('year', current_date)::date
  AND trade_dt < (date_trunc('year', current_date) + interval '1 year')::date)
SELECT
  type_repo,
  COUNT(*) AS deal_count,
  AVG(GREATEST(COALESCE(sell_amount, 0), COALESCE(buy_amount, 0))) AS avg_balance_amount,
  MAX(GREATEST(COALESCE(sell_amount, 0), COALESCE(buy_amount, 0))) AS max_balance_amount,
  AVG((leg2_exec_dt - trade_dt)) AS avg_days_to_first_leg_execution,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS unique_agreements
FROM repo_deals
GROUP BY type_repo;

items.question: Показать для каждого договора, закрытого в прошлом месяце, общий ненулевой остаток по всем счетам.
items.answer:
WITH closed_contracts AS (SELECT DISTINCT c.agreement_id, c.fact_final_date
FROM v_f_contract c
WHERE c.fact_final_date >= date_trunc('month', current_date) - interval '1 month'
  AND c.fact_final_date < date_trunc('month', current_date))
SELECT
  cc.agreement_id,
  cc.fact_final_date,
  SUM(CASE
  WHEN ca.balance_out <> 0 THEN ca.balance_out
  ELSE 0 END) AS total_nonzero_balance_out
FROM closed_contracts cc
JOIN v_f_contract_account ca
  ON ca.agreement_id = cc.agreement_id
GROUP BY cc.agreement_id, cc.fact_final_date;

items.question: Показать топ-5 сделок с наибольшими остатками на сегодня. Вывести номер сделки, тип РЕПО, остаток, валюту и текущую ставку.
items.answer:
WITH deal_balances AS (SELECT d.deal_security_nbr, d.type_repo, CASE
  WHEN d.type_repo = 1 THEN d.sell_amount
  WHEN d.type_repo = 2 THEN d.buy_amount
  ELSE greatest(coalesce(d.sell_amount, 0), coalesce(d.buy_amount, 0)) END AS balance, f.id AS currency_id, r.rate AS current_rate
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
JOIN v_f_repo_rate r
  ON r.leg1_deal_security_id = d.leg1_deal_security_id
  AND r.balance_date = d.balance_date
LEFT JOIN vfund f
  ON f.id = d.settle_cur_id
WHERE d.balance_date = current_date)
SELECT
  deal_security_nbr,
  type_repo,
  balance,
  currency_id,
  current_rate
FROM deal_balances
WHERE balance is not null
  AND current_rate is not null
ORDER BY balance desc
LIMIT 5;

items.question: Выведите для каждого клиента ID клиента в CORE, его глобальный уникальный идентификатор клиента, текущий статус, количество смен статуса за всю историю и ранг клиента по количеству смен статуса в рамках его типа.
items.answer:
WITH client_hist AS (SELECT c.entity_core_id, c.entity_esk_id, c.entity_mdm_id, c.entity_role_id, c.end_date, c.report_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.entity_core_id
ORDER BY c.end_date DESC NULLS LAST, c.report_date DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY c.entity_core_id) AS hist_cnt
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_client c), agg AS (SELECT entity_core_id, MAX(entity_esk_id) AS entity_esk_id, MAX(entity_mdm_id) AS entity_mdm_id, MAX(entity_role_id) AS entity_role_id, MAX(CASE
  WHEN rn = 1 THEN end_date END) AS current_status, MAX(hist_cnt) - 1 AS status_change_cnt
FROM client_hist
GROUP BY entity_core_id)
SELECT
  a.entity_core_id,
  p.guid,
  a.current_status,
  a.status_change_cnt,
  RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY a.entity_role_id
ORDER BY a.status_change_cnt DESC) AS status_change_rank_in_type
FROM agg a
JOIN v_d_entity_psn p
  ON p.entity_core_id = a.entity_core_id;

items.question: Статистика договоров РКО по филиалам за дату: для каждого регионального филиала вывести наименование продукта РКО, количество сделок, количество уникальных клиентов и долю договоров в процентах от общего количества в регионе.
items.answer:
WITH base AS (SELECT dpf.branch_name AS regional_branch, rc.brnch_region_cd, rc.product_nm, rc.agreement_id, rc.entity_id
FROM rko_contracts rc
JOIN v_department_pc_fed dpf
  ON rc.branch_code = dpf.branch_code
WHERE rc.report_date = CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT
  regional_branch,
  brnch_region_cd,
  product_nm,
  COUNT(*) AS deal_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT entity_id) AS unique_clients,
  100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY regional_branch, brnch_region_cd) AS deal_share_pct
FROM base
GROUP BY regional_branch, brnch_region_cd, product_nm
ORDER BY regional_branch, brnch_region_cd, product_nm;

items.question: Для всех брокерских договоров выведите на 2025-12-31 пол клиента, количество уникальных договоров, количество уникальных клиентов, средний возраст клиентов и максимальное количество договоров у одного клиента.
items.answer:
WITH base AS (SELECT p.gender_cd, c.agreement_id, c.entity_core_id, p.birth_dt
FROM v_f_broker_agmt_client c
JOIN v_d_entity_psn p
  ON p.entity_core_id = c.entity_core_id
WHERE c.report_date = DATE '2025-12-31'), per_client AS (SELECT gender_cd, entity_core_id, COUNT(DISTINCT agreement_id) AS agreements_per_client
FROM base
GROUP BY gender_cd, entity_core_id)
SELECT
  b.gender_cd,
  COUNT(DISTINCT b.agreement_id) AS unique_agreements,
  COUNT(DISTINCT b.entity_core_id) AS unique_clients,
  EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM AVG(AGE(DATE '2025-12-31', b.birth_dt))) AS avg_age_years, MAX(pc.agreements_per_client) AS max_agreements_per_client
FROM base b
JOIN per_client pc
  ON pc.gender_cd = b.gender_cd
  AND pc.entity_core_id = b.entity_core_id
GROUP BY b.gender_cd
ORDER BY b.gender_cd;

items.question: Сколько клиентов по каждому типу (ЮЛ, ИП, Банки) и их доля в процентах?
items.answer:
WITH classified AS (SELECT CASE
  WHEN lower(coalesce(kopfcode, '')) LIKE '%банк%'
  OR lower(coalesce(name, '')) LIKE '%банк%' THEN 'Банки'
  WHEN lower(coalesce(kopfcode, '')) LIKE '%ип%'
  OR lower(coalesce(name, '')) LIKE '%ип%' THEN 'ИП'
  ELSE 'ЮЛ' END AS customer_type
FROM vcustomer)
SELECT
  customer_type,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
  COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER () AS share_percent
FROM classified
GROUP BY customer_type
ORDER BY customer_type;

items.question: Для каждого типа клиента выведите количество клиентов, средний возраст в годах и страну регистрации, где больше всего клиентов этого типа.
items.answer:
WITH base AS (SELECT c.description AS customer_type, p.entity_core_id, p.birth_dt, ec.reg_country_id, cn.name AS reg_country_name
FROM vcustomer c
JOIN v_d_entity_psn p
  ON p.entity_core_id = c.id
JOIN v_f_entity_country ec
  ON ec.entity_id = p.entity_core_id
JOIN vcountry cn
  ON cn.id = ec.reg_country_id), type_country AS (SELECT customer_type, reg_country_id, reg_country_name, COUNT(*) AS country_cnt
FROM base
GROUP BY customer_type, reg_country_id, reg_country_name), ranked_country AS (SELECT customer_type, reg_country_name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_type
ORDER BY country_cnt DESC, reg_country_name) AS rn
FROM type_country)
SELECT
  b.customer_type,
  COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
  EXTRACT(YEAR
FROM AVG(AGE(CURRENT_DATE, b.birth_dt))) AS avg_age_years, rc.reg_country_name AS top_registration_country
FROM base b
JOIN ranked_country rc
  ON rc.customer_type = b.customer_type
  AND rc.rn = 1
GROUP BY b.customer_type, rc.reg_country_name
ORDER BY b.customer_type;

items.question: Для каждого клиента определите миграционный профиль: ID клиента в CORE, количество уникальных стран из REG, FACT, TAX, ACTV, флаг международности и процент клиентов в его типе с таким же или более сложным профилем.
items.answer:
WITH client_profile AS (SELECT e.entity_core_id, e.entity_type, count(DISTINCT c.country_id) AS unique_country_cnt, CASE
  WHEN count(DISTINCT c.country_id) > 1 THEN 1
  ELSE 0 END AS international_flag
FROM v_d_entity_org e
LEFT JOIN v_f_entity_country f
  ON f.entity_id = e.entity_core_id
CROSS JOIN lateral (VALUES (f.reg_country_id), (f.fact_country_id), (f.tax_country_id), (f.actv_country_id::bigint)) AS c(country_id)
WHERE c.country_id is not null
GROUP BY e.entity_core_id, e.entity_type), profile_share AS (SELECT cp.*, 100.0 * avg(CASE
  WHEN cp2.unique_country_cnt >= cp.unique_country_cnt THEN 1.0
  ELSE 0.0 END) AS pct_clients_with_same_or_more_complex_profile_in_type
FROM client_profile cp
JOIN client_profile cp2
  ON cp2.entity_type = cp.entity_type
GROUP BY cp.entity_core_id, cp.entity_type, cp.unique_country_cnt, cp.international_flag)
SELECT
  entity_core_id AS client_core_id,
  unique_country_cnt,
  international_flag,
  pct_clients_with_same_or_more_complex_profile_in_type
FROM profile_share;

items.question: Найти сделки, где произошло значительное изменение ставки больше 20 процентов и одновременно изменились остатки на счетах за последние 6 месяцев более чем на 1000. Вывести номер сделки, номер договора, тип РЕПО, процент изменения ставки и среднее значение изменения остатков.
items.answer:
WITH rate_bounds AS (SELECT agreement_id, MIN(percent_rate) AS min_rate, MAX(percent_rate) AS max_rate
FROM v_f_contract_rate_ref
WHERE percent_rate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY agreement_id), rate_change AS (SELECT agreement_id, CASE
  WHEN min_rate IS NULL
  OR min_rate = 0 THEN NULL
  ELSE ABS((max_rate - min_rate) / NULLIF(min_rate, 0)) * 100 END AS rate_change_pct
FROM rate_bounds), rest_monthly AS (SELECT leg1_deal_security_id, date_trunc('month', balance_date)::date AS balance_month, AVG(balance_out) AS avg_balance_out
FROM v_f_repo_acc_rest
WHERE balance_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 months'
GROUP BY leg1_deal_security_id, date_trunc('month', balance_date)::date), rest_monthly_diff AS (SELECT leg1_deal_security_id, ABS(avg_balance_out - LAG(avg_balance_out) OVER (PARTITION BY leg1_deal_security_id
ORDER BY balance_month)) AS balance_change
FROM rest_monthly), rest_change_agg AS (SELECT leg1_deal_security_id, AVG(balance_change) AS avg_balance_change
FROM rest_monthly_diff
WHERE balance_change IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY leg1_deal_security_id), deal_rest AS (SELECT d.leg1_deal_security_id, d.agreement_id, d.deal_security_nbr, d.type_repo, c.agreement_nbr
FROM v_f_repo_deal d
JOIN v_d_repo_contract c
  ON c.agreement_id = d.agreement_id)
SELECT
  dr.deal_security_nbr,
  dr.agreement_nbr,
  dr.type_repo,
  rc.rate_change_pct,
  rca.avg_balance_change
FROM deal_rest dr
JOIN rate_change rc
  ON rc.agreement_id = dr.agreement_id
JOIN rest_change_agg rca
  ON rca.leg1_deal_security_id = dr.leg1_deal_security_id
WHERE ABS(rc.rate_change_pct) > 20
  AND ABS(rca.avg_balance_change) > 1000;

items.question: Показать топ-10 договоров по суммарному остатку на счетах с РЕПО-сделками, отсортированных по убыванию остатка, с указанием рейтинга договора.
items.answer:
WITH repo_contract_balances AS (SELECT c.agreement_id, MAX(r.balance_date) AS balance_date, SUM(c.agreement_account_rest) AS total_rest
FROM v_f_contract_od c
JOIN v_f_repo_deal r
  ON r.agreement_id = c.agreement_id
GROUP BY c.agreement_id), ranked AS (SELECT agreement_id, balance_date, total_rest, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_rest DESC) AS contract_rank
FROM repo_contract_balances)
SELECT
  agreement_id,
  balance_date,
  total_rest,
  contract_rank
FROM ranked
ORDER BY total_rest DESC, agreement_id
LIMIT 10;
